arts.ttl: Reece James gives honest ‘disrespected’ Chelsea verdict after Stamford Bridge shock
arts.sum: Chelsea captain Reece James has admitted that his side maybe ‘disrespected’ the UEFA Conference League following their 2-1 loss against Legia Warsaw on Thursday night. Although they booked their place in the semi-final of the competition, where they will play Swedish side Djurgarden, James outlined the feeling in the dressing room after the full time whistle.

arts.ttl: Reece James sends damning Chelsea message to put Enzo Maresca under more pressure
arts.sum: Chelsea were beaten by Legia Warsaw at Stamford Bridge to spark discontent from their supporters and captain Reece James questioned his team's application in the European fixture

arts.ttl: Chelsea urged to complete AMBITIOUS transfer for Man City superstar
arts.sum: Chelsea legend Joe Cole has urged his former club to re-sign Manchester City midfielder Kevin De Bruyne on a free transfer this summer. The Belgium international made just nine appearances during a two-year spell at Chelsea, but Cole has urged the Blues to pursue a Bosman deal during the 2025 summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Preview: Fulham vs. Chelsea - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Premier League clash between Fulham and Chelsea, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Report: Enzo Maresca is personally 'putting pressure' on Chelsea's board to sign striker who's like Erling Haaland
It’s complicated: Awkward marriage of Maresca and Chelsea provides great drama | Barney Ronay
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca loves controlled buildup play while Blues fans tend to like forceful football. Conflict seemed inevitable There was a news story this week about a team of a hundred scientists who have spent nine years analysing a single cubic millimetre of mouse brain. The one hundred scientists have finally published their results. And those results are basically: “Whoah, have you seen this stuff?” What they found inside the cubic millimetre of mouse brain was an eternity of wiring, just miles and miles of tiny wire to be untangled, pictured in the accompanying article clumped into a single mass, like a pan of mouse brain vermicelli left overnight in the sink. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Five reasons why Chelsea should sack Enzo Maresca
arts.sum: Chelsea ’s slump under Clearlake Capital has been well-documented and Enzo Maresca is the latest head coach to face questions over his long-term future in west London. Mauricio Pochettino was the latest to fall foul at Stamford Bridge last summer, despite the fact that his eight wins in the final 12 Premier League games of last season would’ve earned Chelsea a Europa League spot if Manchester City had triumphed in the FA Cup final.

arts.ttl: Derby clash ‘like a final’ for both Fulham and Chelsea – Silva
arts.sum: Sunday’s west London derby is “like a final” for Fulham as well as Chelsea, Marco Silva insists. A win for Chelsea would massively boost their bid for a Champions League place. But Fulham are also in the running for a European spot, making the match a hugely important one for both clubs.
